title: Premier Oriental Rug Cleaning & Artisan Restoration Shop
description:
This 39-year-established Oriental rug cleaning, repair, and restoration workshop is one of the most trusted and reputable artisan rug specialists in the Dallas–Fort Worth market. Serving affluent residential neighborhoods, interior designers, collectors, and boutique commercial clients, the Company offers premium hand-washing, expert reweaving, fringe and binding repair, color correction, moth treatment, and rug resale services. Operating from a 2,600 sq/ft facility with low overhead and a strong repeat customer base, this business delivers high-margin, reputation-driven revenue with significant growth opportunities in digital marketing, designer partnerships, expanded pickup and delivery routes, and online rug sales. The owner will provide training to ensure a smooth transition. Ideal for a buyer seeking a defensible, high-demand service business with exceptional longevity and craftsmanship. NDA required for additional details.

Ad#:2442973
